homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (very poor) to 7 (excellent).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment is an instrumental vintage cartoon soundtrack featuring a lively and cheerful melody played by a full orchestra. The fast tempo and steady rhythm create a lighthearted, playful mood suitable for comedic scenes or classic animation.

prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends fast-paced drum and bass rhythms with a strong electronic bass line, creating an intense and energetic atmosphere. The driving beat and futuristic synth sounds make it perfectly suited for high-stakes video game scenes like boss battles or rapid action sequences. While the music features a dark and heavy mood typical of experimental electronic genres, its relentless energy keeps the listener engaged from start to finish.

questions.caption: This instrumental segment creates a dark and ominous atmosphere through the use of a low-frequency drone, a high-pitched tone, and a mechanical hum. The piece builds suspense effectively, making it well-suited for a horror movie soundtrack or a scene depicting a mechanical breakdown in an industrial setting.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental piece features a lively violin melody accompanied by flute, set against a rhythmic tabla background that creates an upbeat dance atmosphere. The track evokes an energetic mood suitable for an Indian-themed movie or television soundtrack, standing apart from the smoother jazz and saxophone styles often found in similar archival uploads.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends a strong Latin influence with a steady drumming rhythm and a groovy, percussive bass line. Keyboard accompaniment adds complexity to the melody while driving the piece forward with an energetic dance groove. The overall mood feels romantic and passionate, making it suitable for a dramatic or uplifting movie soundtrack.
